# Pull Request: [Your Concise Feature or Fix Title Here]

---

## Overview

Provide a brief overview of the purpose of this Pull Request.  
State what the feature, improvement, or fix is about, and why it's needed.

---

## Implementation Details

- Summarize the key technical decisions and approaches.
- Highlight any major modules/classes/functions added or updated.
- Mention any patterns or standards followed (if relevant).

---

## Features Added / Changes Made

- List the major features, endpoints, or components added or modified.
- Use bullet points for clarity.
- Example:
  - Feature 1: Description
  - Feature 2: Description
  - Bugfix: Correct handling of XYZ

---

## Screenshots / UI Changes (if applicable)

| Before           | After            |
| ---------------- | ---------------- |
| (Add screenshot) | (Add screenshot) |

---

## How to Test

1. Step-by-step instructions for testers/reviewers.
2. Environment setup notes, data needed, etc.
3. Expected behavior after changes.

---

## Related Issues / Tickets (if necessary)

- Closes #[issue number]
- Relates to #[issue number]

---

## Checklist

- [ ] Have you synced with the latest main before this PR
- [ ] Code builds and passes checks
- [ ] Tests added/updated, if necessary
- [ ] Documentation updated, if necessary

---

## Additional Notes

- Add any extra discussion, challenges, or notes
